mapper.insert: insert into ruku(name, supplier, price, quantity, money, rktime, user) values(#{name},#{supplier},#{price},#{quantity},#{money},#{rktime},#{user})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ruku WHERE DATE(rktime) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money),0) FROM ruku WHERE DATE(rktime) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ruku WHERE YEAR(rktime)=YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(rktime)=MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money),0) FROM ruku WHERE YEAR(rktime)=YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(rktime)=MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money),0) FROM ruku WHERE YEAR(rktime) = YEAR(CURDATE())
